<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Submit URPay Pay payment method"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/checkout/api/sdk/v1/urpay/submit/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>




            To initiate a payment using the SDK for URPay pay Payment,
            you are required to submit the customer's phone number
            and indicate whether to enable the option to save the card for future use.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
